title: CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR WASCO CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 1113 Kelly Avenue The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 296-8118 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-8118 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Wasco County Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Toy Libraries/Toy Loan Programs Toy/Game Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
